titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 8: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 8. (A.R. No. 42 of 1995-96.) TIRUVIŚALŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall, central shrine, Śivayōganāthaśvāmin temple.

Incomplete. Records that (the king) Parakēsarivarman alias śrī Gaṇḍarādittan Madhurāntakan donated kāśu in order to conduct the sacred bath every month on saṅkrānthi day with 108 pots (of water) to the god, Mahādēvar of Tiruviśalūr in Avaṉinārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a dēvadāna-brahmadēyam on the northern bank. With that kāśu plots of land were purchased from several individuals in the name of the god (for conducting the above ceremony).
Published in Varalāṟu issue No. 5, August 1995. PP 5-6.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmarkki yāṇṭu 2- vatiṉ Etir Ām
māṇṭu vaṭakarai tevatāṉabrahmadeyam Avaṉinārāyaṇaccaturvedi ma
ṅkalattu tiruvicalūr mahādevaṟkku Ik kopparakesaripanmarāṉa śrīkaṇṭa
rātittaṉ madhurāntakaṉ cantirātittavalt tiṅkaḷ saṅgarāndhikaḷ toṟum nūṟṟeṭṭu kalaca
m snapanamāṭṭuvataṟkku kācukaḷ varakkāṭṭi Idevar perāley vilai koṇṭa nilam
Ivvūr vaṅkippuṟattu sikataiyat tiruvaraṅkadevabhaṭṭaniṭaiyum makkaḷiṭaiyu
m kaik koṇṭa nilam kiḻmuḻaiyūr Eḻu māvaraiyum kuñcipāvir kalā nārāyaṇa bha
ṭṭaṉiṭai vilai koṇṭatu tiruvicallūriṉ vaṭapakkattu Araiykkā(l)lum māvaṇṭu
r Attāṇi kiramavittaṉum tampiymārum Iṭaiy vilai koṇṭatu Ittiruvicallūr
riṉ vaṭapakkattu kālceyyu vaṅkiypuṟattu tiruvicalūr devacaṉmaṉṉiṭai vi
laiy koṇṭatu Iy śirikoyiliṉ teṉpakkattu Araiykkālum Iruṅkaṇṭi bhaṭṭa nampibha
ṭṭaṉiṭai vilai koṇṭatu tiruvicalūriṉ vaṭapakkattu mākāṇiyum velveṭṭiy tiruvicallūr A
ṭiyaṉ bhaṭṭaṉiṭai vilai koṇṭatu It tiruvicallūriṉ vaṭapakkattu Araiyk kā(l)lum
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 8 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
